label: Lab Automation v2 - SAFE
info: Defaults to Manual. Only the Auto gate may publish relay /set commands.

name: Validate mode; default manual
func: const m=String(msg.payload).toLowerCase(); const mode=['manual','monitor','auto'].includes(m)?m:'manual'; flow.set('mode',mode); msg.payload=mode; msg.retain=true; return msg;

name: Validate, sequence, two-empty, map, dedupe
func: const r=msg.payload, mode=flow.get('mode')||'manual'; if(!r||r.version!=='2.0'||r.healthy!==true||!Array.isArray(r.zones)||r.zones.length!==6||r.total!==r.zones.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)||r.window_seconds!==60||r.sample_count<1)return [null,null,{payload:'invalid report'}]; const last=flow.get('seq')??-1;if(r.sequence<=last)return [null,null,{payload:'duplicate or out-of-order'}];flow.set('seq',r.sequence);let streak=flow.get('empty')||[0,0,0,0,0,0],prev=flow.get('intended')||[false,false,false,false,false,false,false,false,false,false];let z=r.zones.map((v,i)=>{if(v>0){streak[i]=0;return true;}streak[i]++;return streak[i]>=2?false:prev[i];});flow.set('empty',streak);let d=[...z,z[0]||z[1],z[1]||z[2],z[3]||z[4],z[4]||z[5]];flow.set('intended',d);let confirmed=flow.get('confirmed')||[false,false,false,false,false,false,false,false,false,false];let commands=d.map((v,i)=>v!==confirmed[i]?{topic:`labos/v2/relay/${i+1}/set`,payload:v?'ON':'OFF',retain:false}:null).filter(Boolean);let decision={payload:{mode,sequence:r.sequence,intended:d,commands:commands.length}};return [decision,mode==='auto'?commands:null,null];
